        "import asyncio",

        "    await asyncio.sleep(0)",
        '    return f\"done:{name}\"',
      ].join

function:scripts/mock-api/routes/llm/dynamic.mjs:[

    awaitLine ? awaitLine.trimEnd() : "  return `done:${name}`;",
    awaitLine ? "  return `done:${name}`;" : "",
    "}",

  ]
    .filter(Boolean)
